scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && shx mv dist/preload.js dist/preload.cjs
scripts.dev: npm run build:frontend && tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && shx mv dist/preload.js dist/preload.cjs && electron .
scripts.dev:electron: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && shx mv dist/preload.js dist/preload.cjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.dev:hot: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && shx mv dist/preload.js dist/preload.cjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
